sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83714" key="pleonosu/llabos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλεονο-σύλλᾰβος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having more syllables,</tr_> Charis.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0082.tlg001:p.539" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.539</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
